title: Kenneth Branagh Says He ‘Would Love’ To Direct Another ‘Thor’ Film: ‘I’d Always Wanted to Do More and Indeed Had a Couple of Ideas’
content:
ByArushi Jacob

Kenneth Branagh, the director behind the 2011Marvelfilm “Thor,” says he’d be open to returning to the world of superheroes.Branagh toldBusiness Insider, “Part of me would love to finish my relationship with that character. I’d always wanted to do more and indeed had a couple of ideas, more in the territory of James Mangold’s brilliant ‘Logan.’ I would love to see Chris Hemsworth and the others have their own individual final story that takes ‘Thor’ into a glorious twilight.”Branagh added that despite being asked, he chose not to return as director for the film’s sequels as he “definitely was ready for another,” just not at the time. He said, “Marvel shoots are intense. Marvel postproduction is more intense — wildly exciting but super intense. I definitely needed to smell the roses. Kevin Feige was very understanding, and so was the cast. I needed a break.”“Thor” was followed by Alan Taylor’s “Thor: The Dark World” in 2013 before Taika Waititi took over as director for “Thor: Ragnarok”(2017) and “Thor: Love and Thunder” (2022).The “Belfast” director said he watched the sequels with “a mix of tremendous pride and amazement at the many ways such stories can go,” adding that it “would be something very beautiful to take those characters into their own particular sunset,” when asked about returning to the franchise.However, Branagh concluded, “They are so far deep into the future of the Marvel Universe that I’m sure whatever plans they have for it are already kind of set. All I know is there’s something beautiful to be had out of arriving at a conclusion for that arc of those stories with those characters and those actors.”
title_zh: 肯尼斯·布蘭納(Kenneth Branagh)表示他「非常希望」能夠執導另一部《雷神》(Thor)電影：「我一直想做更多，實際上也有幾個想法。」
content_zh:
作者：阿魯希·雅各(Arushi Jacob)

克內斯·布蘭納(Kenneth Branagh)，2011年漫威電影《雷神Thor》的導演，表示他願意回到超級英雄的世界。布蘭納在接受《商業內幕》(Business Insider)訪問時說：「我內心的一部分希望能完成與那個角色的關係。我一直想做更多的事情，實際上也有幾個想法，更接近詹姆斯·曼戈德(James Mangold)的精彩作品《洛根(Logan)》。我希望看到克里斯·海姆斯沃斯(Chris Hemsworth)和其他人擁有各自獨特的最終故事，將《雷神Thor》帶入一個輝煌的黃昏。」布蘭納補充說，儘管曾被邀請，他選擇不回來擔任續集的導演，因為他「絕對準備好再來一次」，只是當時不行。他表示：「漫威的拍攝非常緊湊。漫威的後期製作更是如此——令人興奮但超級緊張。我確實需要去聞聞玫瑰。凱文·費吉(Kevin Feige)非常理解，演員們也是。我需要一段休息時間。」

《雷神Thor》之後是艾倫·泰勒(Alan Taylor)於2013年執導的《雷神：黑暗世界Thor: The Dark World》，隨後塔伊卡·維提提(Taika Waititi)接手執導《雷神： Ragnarok》(2017)和《雷神：愛與雷霆Thor: Love and Thunder》(2022)。這位《貝爾法斯特(Belfast)》的導演表示，他以「驚人的自豪感和驚訝的心情」觀看了續集，對於這些故事的多種可能性感到驚訝，並補充說：「如果能將那些角色帶入他們各自的日落，那將是非常美麗的。」當被問及是否會回到這個系列時，他如此表示。

然而，布蘭納總結道：「他們已經深入漫威宇宙的未來，我相信他們對此的計劃已經有了大致的安排。我所知道的是，能夠為這些角色和這些演員的故事弧找到一個結局，將會是非常美麗的。」
summary_zh:
